title: They still wear school uniforms 14 years after 3I
display_title: They still wear school uniforms 14 years after 3I
wikitext:
[]: They still wear school uniforms 14 years after 3I?             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Tue Jul 02, 2013 10:30 am [Split from "Do you think there will be a final classroom scene in 4.0?" . - Monk] Speaking of school -- why are the uniforms still en vogue 14 years after Third Impact? That's pretty weird. Shinji, Kaworu and Rei all have them. Personally, I'm hoping for some freaky Jim Jones school filled with brainwashed Eva pilots trained to do Gendo's bidding.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Jul 02, 2013 10:37 am Warren Peace wrote: Speaking of school -- why are the uniforms still en vogue 14 years after Third Impact? That's pretty weird. Shinji, Kaworu and Rei all have them.

[]: Re: They still wear school uniforms 14 years after 3I?             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Tue Jul 02, 2013 12:30 pm Warren Peace wrote: [Split from "Do you think there will be a final classroom scene in 4.0?" . - Monk] Speaking of school -- why are the uniforms still en vogue 14 years after Third Impact? That's pretty weird. Shinji, Kaworu and Rei all have them. Personally, I'm hoping for some freaky Jim Jones school filled with brainwashed Eva pilots trained to do Gendo's bidding.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jul 02, 2013 1:06 pm Still strikes me as weird how 3.0 Rei has the AU Rei uniform from Episode 26/2.0's Next Time Preview. (See the linked images in the quote.) But yeah, I figured they just never bothered getting rid of the school uniforms. The pilots can't be wearing plugsuits all the time.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue Jul 02, 2013 1:15 pm The uniforms themselves are probably Nerv issue. If you look at the children's desks in 1.0/2.0, they have a Tokyo-3 Nerv leaf logo on them. The fact that the uniforms come from an automated dispenser, and that Toji wore one at some point, leads me to believe that they are in effect, a type of uniform for civilians/pilots. Note that Asuka and Rei also worse their uniforms while on duty in Nerv HQ, and this despite Asuka having a penchant for changes of outfit elsewhere.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Jul 02, 2013 1:46 pm Since N3I and possibly 3I, going down to the shops to get new clothes has presumably been less of an option. The school clothes are functional; they will serve - what else is there to consider?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Jul 02, 2013 4:18 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: The uniforms themselves are probably Nerv issue. If you look at the children's desks in 1.0/2.0, they have a Tokyo-3 Nerv leaf logo on them.
